    How to Buy $CATA

    $CATA CONTRACT ADDRESS: 0xBDf5bAfEE1291EEc45Ae3aadAc89BE8152D4E673

    1. Create a wallet 

    Download MetaMask or any other wallet app for free from the App Store or Google Play Store. If you're on desktop, just go to metamask.io to download the Google Chrome extension.

    3. Go to Pancake swap

    Open pancakeswap.finance/swap in the browser inside your MetaMask App. Connect your wallet. Paste the $CATA token address into PancakeSwap, select $CATA, and confirm. When prompted by MetaMask, sign the wallet signature.

    2. Get Some BNB

    Have BNB in your wallet to switch to $CATA. If you don't have any BNB, you can buy it directly on MetaMask, transfer it from another wallet, or buy it on an exchange and send it to your wallet.

    4. Switch BNB FOR $CATA

    Swap your BNB for $CATA. Set the slippage tolerance to at least 1.1%. During times of increased volatility, such as on a listing day, consider setting it higher even double digits.

    LISTING - 11 AM UTC - APRIL 19 - PancakeSwap
